principle: Daily-use workbench before DSL/canvas; minimal truth and privacy-aware operation traces arrive with the first AI loop; direct/lexical/link/structural retrieval precedes optional semantic retrieval; local speech and autocomplete are measured capability adapters; local sources precede live grounding.

milestones.name: Electron shell
acceptance: Dev Docs tab renders v0.5 bedrock
provider credentials cannot enter renderer or remote views
trusted local-runtime worker/sidecar boundary is reserved

milestones.name: Markdown vault and project bundle
acceptance: workspace state can be deleted without losing knowledge
file writes do not create noisy diffs

milestones.name: AI over notes with minimal truth and execution contracts
acceptance: AI mock produces truth-aware response bundle and patch
minimal ActionTrace records location/model/tool, token estimates/actuals when available, latency, external cost, status, and outcome
mapped source citation opens a local anchor
hard budget and cancellation are enforced below renderer
human acceptance is not rendered as factual proof
accepted patch has a meaningful diff

milestones.name: Capture sources and local speech baseline
acceptance: phone uploads image or short audio
transcript.md and optional timestamp sidecar can be created

milestones.name: PDF source with evidence anchors
acceptance: citation can return to original page
rendered fidelity and extracted-text fidelity are not conflated

milestones.name: Web source and explicit imports
acceptance: access date and available revision metadata are recorded
web source import is separate from provider grounding

milestones.name: Live verification provider
acceptance: local evidence is checked before web search
verification modes and hard query/token/time/cost budgets exist
local-only/private mode enforces no cloud call
provider result renders separately with required links/suggestions
actual query and token counts are recorded when available
grounding links are not harvested or auto-imported
one chosen destination source can be imported explicitly through source-core

milestones.name: Hybrid retrieval and agent context basics
acceptance: Tree-sitter/LSP structural adapter can be used for code when available
scoped retrieval produces inspectable evidence-aware ContextPacket
retrieval score is not displayed as truth status
no vector database or embedding model is required

milestones.name: Measured local assistance and autocomplete
acceptance: semantic embedding experiment can be enabled/disabled and rebuilt
semantic retrieval is compared with lexical/link/structural baseline
local completion is explicit or debounced and cancellable
no vault-wide semantic/model call occurs on every keystroke
desktop edit-prediction experiment records acceptance, accepted characters, latency, memory, and tokens
mobile defaults to deterministic completion/capture/speech input
cloud fallback is explicit and budgeted

milestones.name: Public knowledge and dictionary MVP
acceptance: Wikipedia/Wiktionary page can be imported with revision/access metadata
pack or import deletion does not delete user notes

milestones.name: Truth maintenance and execution economics dashboard
acceptance: claim segmentation assistance works without forcing every sentence into a graph
source independence groups can be inspected
provider and local usage traces are visible
external cost per accepted patch/result can be computed
retrieval/transcription/autocomplete outcome-aware metrics can be computed

milestones.name: Atomik DSL
acceptance: scene claims link to source/evidence/Truth Lens

milestones.name: Canvas
acceptance: moving or styling nodes does not mutate epistemic status
canvas references canonical files rather than duplicating knowledge

continuous_constraints: no full canvas before workbench and truth-repair loops work
no DSL parser before workbench loop works
no remote content with Node integration
no provider key in renderer or remote content
no source knowledge trapped only in JSON
no mandatory vector database before baseline retrieval is evaluated
no semantic/model request on every keystroke by default
no universal truth score presented as certainty
no human acceptance presented as factual proof
no provider-grounding output or links used to build a crawler/index/database
no raw prompt/output/source content in telemetry by default
no local external-cost-zero badge that hides measured resource use
no noisy mass rewrites on app open
